added: Four-parent registry, task ledger, run ledger, proof ledger
fam-hub plan review, task promote, run start commands
fam-hub capture extract for review-only capture packets
FAMTASTIC-STATUS.md and Workbench plan-state mirror as manual status packets
proved: Ledger substrate populated with real records (34 tasks, 1 run, 28 proofs as of 2026-05-05)

memory_candidates.title: Ledger substrate uses JSONL + JSON registry, not SQLite
memory_candidates.body: Plans live in plans/registry.json and per-plan plan.json files; tasks/runs/proofs live in JSONL files. Chosen for git-friendliness and human-readability over query speed.
